releaseNotes: Distribuicao direta oficial da NovaApps Studio com validacao de pacote no updater. Esta versao usa o novo pacote com.novaapps.dnschanger; se voce vier do app antigo, instale como novo app e depois remova a versao anterior.
releaseNotesEn: Official NovaApps Studio direct distribution with package validation in the updater. This version uses the new com.novaapps.dnschanger package; if you are coming from the old app, install it as a new app and then remove the previous version.
